mapper.select:
select ls.id, ( select class.name from class where ls.class_id = class.id and class.deleted = 0 ) as className, ( select course.name from course where ls.course_id = course.id and course.deleted = 0 ) as courseName, ls.state, IFNULL( NULLIF(ls.conflict_ids, ''), '无冲突') as conflictIds, ( select group_concat(s.name separator ',') from staff s left join lesson_teacher lt on s.id = lt.teacher_id and lt.type_num = 1 where find_in_set(s.id, ls.teacher_ids) and s.deleted = 0 ) as teacherNames, ( select group_concat(s.name separator ',') from staff s left join lesson_teacher lt on s.id = lt.teacher_id and lt.type_num = 2 and s.deleted = 0 where find_in_set(s.id, ls.teacher_ids) ) AS assistantTeacherNames, ls.start_date, ls.end_date, ( select group_concat( concat( lss.weeks,' ', DATE_FORMAT(lss.start_time,'%H:%i'),'~', DATE_FORMAT(lss.end_time,'%H:%i') ) separator ',' ) from lesson_schedule_setting lss where lss.schedule_id = ls.id ) as date, ls.times, ls.dec_lesson_count, ifnull( ( select lesson.dec_count from lesson where lesson.schedule_id = ls.id and lesson.deleted = 0 ),1) as decCount, ifnull(ls.exclude_holiday,0) as excludeHoliday, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(classroom.name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM lesson_schedule_setting lss LEFT JOIN classroom ON lss.room_id = classroom.id AND classroom.deleted = 0 WHERE lss.schedule_id = ls.id ) as classRoomName from lesson_schedule ls
ls.deleted = 0
and ls.class_id = #{query.classId}
and ls.course_id in ( select id from course where name like concat('%',#{query.courseName},'%') )
order by ifnull(ls.start_date,0) desc, ls.id
